title: User Guides - Onboarding > Fit test for currently connected device
scenario: Verify that the Fit test can be started for the currently connected device via User Guides > Onboarding section in App Settings.
steps: 1. Connect a supported device (Osprey/Tern/Emu) to the app.
3. Go to User Guides > Onboarding section.
4. Attempt to start the Fit test.
expected: The Fit test can be started successfully for the currently connected device.
